**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the maker space desk restriction and the 'single-person plastic/mold middleman' physical destruction probe. This enterprise, named 'Panrun Electronic Technology,' was characterized by the official system as 'Electronic Device Manufacturing.' Its business license conspicuously lists 'development and manufacturing of electronic products and plastic products.' However, the forensic logic engine directly penetrated its weak physical bottom line: the insured headcount is only 1 person! The paid-in capital is a mere 458,000 RMB. The most fatal blow comes from its spatial coordinates: 'L3582, 3rd Floor, Pioneer Building... Jiangning High-tech Park.' Not only is this in a 3rd-floor office building, but a room number like 'L3582' with a letter prefix and four digits is an extremely typical highly subdivided desk address within an incubator or co-working space. The logical deduction instantly turns into a highly satirical demotion trial: on a rented desk on the 3rd floor that might only be 3 square meters, the boss, acting as a sole commander with about 400,000 RMB, claims to have established a heavy-asset industrial assembly line capable of simultaneously 'manufacturing electronic products and injection molding plastic products'? This is not just a trampling on manufacturing common sense, but rubbing the heavy tonnage and pungent exhaust of injection molding machines into the dirt. The probe mercilessly deleted all the 'manufacturing, development' lies in the license, locking onto the only thing he can do at his desk: 'sales and design of molds, plastic products, and electromechanical equipment.' The truth is extremely bare: this is a 100% pure 1-Employee Co-working Desk & Mold/Plastic Parts Broker. The boss rented a cheap desk, primarily taking orders online, helping people design or acting as an agent to find real mold factories to open molds, and then reselling injection-molded parts and auto accessories to earn the intermediary margin. The 'major manufacturing plant' tag bestowed upon it by officials has been subjected to the most thorough 'desk-level' physical demotion by the system.
